readings.Aries: Leadership is not volume. Today, the quieter approach covers more ground. Sleep on it before committing.
readings.Taurus: The appetite you're ignoring is not going away. Give it something real. The timing is better than it feels.
readings.Gemini: Not every thought needs to be shared. Some of them are just thoughts. Something small done consistently has more effect than something large done once.
readings.Cancer: The dream you're not taking seriously is the dream you should take seriously. Say the thing you've been rehearsing.
readings.Leo: Your heart is enormous. The effort to protect it is costing you connection. The energy available today is better used gently.
readings.Virgo: The criticism forming in your mind — apply it to the problem, not the person. Trust the slow version of this over the fast one.
readings.Libra: The mirror you hold up to others reflects you too. What do you see? You already have what you need to take the next step.
readings.Scorpio: You have survived every version of this before. You are going to survive this one too. Something small done consistently has more effect than something large done once.
readings.Sagittarius: Your intuition about a place or situation you haven't experienced yet is probably correct. Trust it. The timing is better than it feels.
readings.Capricorn: You are further along than you think. The metric you're using is incorrect. Something you've been measuring incorrectly just corrected itself.
readings.Aquarius: Your detachment is a skill. Right now, it's also a defence mechanism. Know the difference. Make contact with the actual person rather than the version in your head.
readings.Pisces: There is a person in your life who is grounding and steadying and you take them for granted. Don't. Something you've been measuring incorrectly just corrected itself.

Aries-Aries.synthesis: Neither of you knows how to be small around the other. Decide if that's exhilarating or just exhausting.

Aries-Taurus.synthesis: The slow materials and the fast energy can build something neither could alone. Patience is required from the fire.

Aries-Gemini.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Cancer.synthesis: You affect each other immediately and completely. That's not always comfortable and not always harmful.

Aries-Leo.synthesis: You recognised each other immediately. Whether that's good news depends entirely on what you recognised.

Aries-Virgo.synthesis: You work well when one agrees to be the foundation and the other agrees to be the spark. Agreement is the hard part.

Aries-Libra.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Scorpio.synthesis: The intensity is real. Whether it's connection or pressure depends on which day you're asking.

Aries-Sagittarius.synthesis: There is enough heat between you to forge something remarkable or burn it all down. Usually both.

Aries-Capricorn.synthesis: In theory you stabilise each other. In practice, one of you always feels slightly extinguished.

Aries-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Pisces.synthesis: You challenge each other's default mode — which is either exactly what you needed or what you weren't ready for.

Taurus-Taurus.synthesis: You recognise each other's methods. Whether that familiarity breeds trust or contempt is up to you.

Taurus-Gemini.synthesis: The friction between you is productive until the day one of you decides it isn't worth it. Don't let it go that long.

Taurus-Cancer.synthesis: You move at similar speeds, value similar things. That similarity is either comfort or camouflage.

Taurus-Leo.synthesis: There's something genuinely generative in the friction. Whether either of you can tolerate friction is the question.

Taurus-Virgo.synthesis: You recognise each other's methods. Whether that familiarity breeds trust or contempt is up to you.

Taurus-Libra.synthesis: One of you is always explaining why it should move. One of you is quietly proving why it works as it is.

Taurus-Scorpio.synthesis: The support here is genuine and sometimes suffocating. The line between them is worth watching.

Taurus-Sagittarius.synthesis: The heat is useful when the earth channels it. The earth is useful when the fire can wait long enough.

Taurus-Capricorn.synthesis: Reliability offered freely in both directions. What neither of you is good at is saying what you actually want.

Taurus-Aquarius.synthesis: The ideas need grounding. The ground needs ideas. Neither of you finds this as obvious as it sounds.

Taurus-Pisces.synthesis: This tends to become quietly necessary to both people before either admits it.

Gemini-Gemini.synthesis: The ideas between you breed more ideas. At some point one of them needs to become something real.

Gemini-Cancer.synthesis: The emotional and the intellectual are in conversation here. When it works, it's singular. When it doesn't, it's lonely.

Gemini-Leo.synthesis: You accelerate each other. The direction you're heading is worth establishing before you reach full speed.

Gemini-Virgo.synthesis: The friction between you is productive until the day one of you decides it isn't worth it. Don't let it go that long.

Gemini-Libra.synthesis: The conversation never stops. Decide if what you're talking around is more interesting than what you'd find if you arrived.

Gemini-Scorpio.synthesis: The connection is real and confusing to both of you. You're not sure how it works. It works anyway.

Gemini-Sagittarius.synthesis: You're both good at starting things. One of you will have to become better at finishing them.

Gemini-Capricorn.synthesis: One of you is always explaining why it should move. One of you is quietly proving why it works as it is.

Gemini-Aquarius.synthesis: You both live a little inside your heads. When you're together, the heads get very crowded.

Gemini-Pisces.synthesis: The mismatch in how you process things is a feature in good times and a fault line in bad ones.

Cancer-Cancer.synthesis: Nobody outside this pairing fully understands what happens inside it. That's exactly how you want it.

Cancer-Leo.synthesis: One of you runs toward; one guards the door. The dance is interesting until someone gets tired.

Cancer-Virgo.synthesis: You offer each other what you each struggle most to give yourself: one of you offers ground, one of you offers feeling.

Cancer-Libra.synthesis: The mismatch in how you process things is a feature in good times and a fault line in bad ones.

Cancer-Scorpio.synthesis: You both know how to hold pain without speaking. Decide if that's strength or evasion.

Cancer-Sagittarius.synthesis: The intensity is real. Whether it's connection or pressure depends on which day you're asking.

Cancer-Capricorn.synthesis: The stability and the depth work well together — until they work too well and nobody grows.

Cancer-Aquarius.synthesis: The emotional and the intellectual are in conversation here. When it works, it's singular. When it doesn't, it's lonely.

Cancer-Pisces.synthesis: You feel each other before you know each other. Whether that's intimacy or projection is worth examining.

Leo-Leo.synthesis: There is enough heat between you to forge something remarkable or burn it all down. Usually both.

Leo-Virgo.synthesis: In theory you stabilise each other. In practice, one of you always feels slightly extinguished.

Leo-Libra.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Leo-Scorpio.synthesis: You are changed by proximity to each other. This is not neutral, and it was never going to be.

Leo-Sagittarius.synthesis: Together you are louder, brighter, and harder to ignore. Whether that's what you need is a different question.

Leo-Capricorn.synthesis: There's something genuinely generative in the friction. Whether either of you can tolerate friction is the question.

Leo-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Leo-Pisces.synthesis: The intensity is real. Whether it's connection or pressure depends on which day you're asking.

Virgo-Virgo.synthesis: Neither of you wastes anything. The question is whether you're saving the relationship or just managing it.

Virgo-Libra.synthesis: You complement each other in ways neither fully acknowledges. The acknowledgment is the missing piece.

Virgo-Scorpio.synthesis: You offer each other what you each struggle most to give yourself: one of you offers ground, one of you offers feeling.

Virgo-Sagittarius.synthesis: Your natural speeds are different. Finding the pace that doesn't frustrate either of you is the whole project.

Virgo-Capricorn.synthesis: The practical language between you is fluent and efficient. The emotional one takes more effort from both.

Virgo-Aquarius.synthesis: What you bring each other is exactly what the other struggles to generate alone. This should be easy. It isn't.

Virgo-Pisces.synthesis: The stability and the depth work well together — until they work too well and nobody grows.

Libra-Libra.synthesis: You make each other sharper. You also make each other better at avoiding the things words can't fix.

Libra-Scorpio.synthesis: You make each other think differently — one about the world, one about themselves. That's not nothing.

Libra-Sagittarius.synthesis: You accelerate each other. The direction you're heading is worth establishing before you reach full speed.

Libra-Capricorn.synthesis: You complement each other in ways neither fully acknowledges. The acknowledgment is the missing piece.

Libra-Aquarius.synthesis: You make each other sharper. You also make each other better at avoiding the things words can't fix.

Libra-Pisces.synthesis: One of you explains. One of you feels. At some point the explaining stops helping.

Scorpio-Scorpio.synthesis: The bond forms quietly and completely. What you've bonded over — desire, or need — is worth knowing.

Scorpio-Sagittarius.synthesis: The heat and the depth exist in real tension. That tension is the most honest thing between you.

Scorpio-Capricorn.synthesis: One of you protects, one of you nourishes. At some point both of you need to be taken care of.

Scorpio-Aquarius.synthesis: You make each other think differently — one about the world, one about themselves. That's not nothing.

Scorpio-Pisces.synthesis: The depth here is real and a little unnerving to both of you.

Sagittarius-Sagittarius.synthesis: There is enough heat between you to forge something remarkable or burn it all down. Usually both.

Sagittarius-Capricorn.synthesis: The slow materials and the fast energy can build something neither could alone. Patience is required from the fire.

Sagittarius-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Sagittarius-Pisces.synthesis: You challenge each other's default mode — which is either exactly what you needed or what you weren't ready for.

Capricorn-Capricorn.synthesis: You build things that last. The slower the construction, the less you talk about what might be missing.

Capricorn-Aquarius.synthesis: What you bring each other is exactly what the other struggles to generate alone. This should be easy. It isn't.

Capricorn-Pisces.synthesis: This tends to become quietly necessary to both people before either admits it.

Aquarius-Aquarius.synthesis: The conversation never stops. Decide if what you're talking around is more interesting than what you'd find if you arrived.

Aquarius-Pisces.synthesis: The connection is real and confusing to both of you. You're not sure how it works. It works anyway.

Pisces-Pisces.synthesis: You absorb each other's moods completely. Make sure the current is flowing in a direction you chose.

calculation_methods: Planetary longitudes: Jean Meeus 'Astronomical Algorithms' low-precision formulae (±1° accuracy)
Retrograde: computed from direction of longitude change vs previous day
Aspects: angular separation with standard orbs (conjunction 8°, sextile 6°, square/trine/opposition 8°, quincunx 3°)
Compatibility: element harmony base score + modality adjustment + date-seeded variance
Daily readings: deterministic date-seed (PRNG) selects from 60-entry per-sign pools + 30-entry suffix pool; 1,800 combinations per sign
